description: A vessel scheduled to arrive at the port is diverted to another port by its owners at the last minute.

nodes.task_description: Receive notification from the vessel agent that the vessel will no longer be calling at the port.

expected_outcome.expected: The scheduler receives the cancellation notice.

nodes.task_description: Cancel the vessel's berth allocation in the scheduling system.

expected_outcome.expected: The berth previously assigned to the vessel is now shown as available.

nodes.task_description: Cancel all associated pilot, tug, and mooring services to avoid cancellation fees.

expected_outcome.expected: All booked services for the vessel call are successfully cancelled.
